violations.text: Various prepared foods and sliced deli items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The door to the establishment's toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing to limit potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was washed, rinsed, and sanitized during time of inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Various sliced deli meats and cheeses was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
